title: Diamondback Energy (FANG) Q2 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Diamondback Energy (FANG) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.68 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.92 per share. This compares to earnings of $7.07 per share a year ago.

title: Diamondback Energy misses profit estimates on weaker energy prices
text: U.S. shale oil producer Diamondback Energy missed Wall Street estimates for second-quarter profit on Monday, as oil and gas prices took a hit from concerns around a weakening global economy.

title: Letter to Stockholders Issued by Diamondback Energy, Inc.
text: MIDLAND, Texas, July 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Stockholders, This letter is meant to be a supplement to our earnings release and is being furnished to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and released to our stockholders simultaneously with our earnings release. Please see the information regarding forward-looking statements and non-GAAP financial information included at the end of this letter.

title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2023 Financial and Operating Results; Increases Base Dividend
text: MIDLAND, Texas, July 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (“Diamondback” or the “Company”) today announced financial and operating results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023.

title: Oil Is Quietly Back Around $80 a Barrel (and Has $90 in Its Sights)
text: Oil prices have risen by nearly $10 over the past month and could continue rallying. Higher oil prices would enable producers to generate more cash.

title: Will Low Oil Prices Dent Diamondback's (FANG) Q2 Earnings?
text: Lower commodity prices and higher costs are likely to have impacted the second-quarter earnings of Diamondback Energy (FANG).

title: Diamondback: A Top-Tier Energy Play And Potential M&A Target
text: Energy assets are crucial for long-term results, as US shale output growth has peaked, and inflation is likely to remain sticky. Diamondback Energy is a top oil play with deep reserves, efficient operations, healthy debt levels, and a shareholder-friendly distribution plan. FANG's attractive valuation and oil footprint make it a potential takeover target, while its overall qualities position it for long-term outperformance in the energy sector.

title: Earnings Preview: Diamondback Energy (FANG) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Diamondback (FANG) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for July 20th
text: CWEN, FANG and FCCO have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on July 20, 2023.

title: 3 Oil Stocks to Buy as Saudi Arabia Presses to Push Crude Prices Higher
text: Saudi Arabia is extending its production cuts by another month. That continues its efforts to drive up oil prices.
